name: Safety Deprioritization
description: Company deprioritized safety research in favor of capabilities, shipping speed, or revenue.

name: Rushed Deployment
description: Models deployed to production without adequate safety testing or evaluation.

name: Inadequate Oversight
description: Insufficient internal governance, review processes, or board accountability for high-risk systems.

name: Alignment Research Gaps
description: Insufficient investment in alignment, interpretability, or superalignment research.

name: Lack of Transparency
description: Company withheld information about model capabilities, risks, or safety evaluations from the public.

name: Military Applications
description: AI systems developed or deployed for military, defense, or surveillance purposes.

name: Workforce Displacement
description: Concerns about accelerating automation without adequate worker transition support.

name: AGI Risk Underestimation
description: Leadership dismisses or underestimates risks from advanced AI systems or AGI timelines.

name: Whistleblower Retaliation
description: Employee faced retaliation, firing, equity clawback, or NDA pressure after raising safety concerns.

name: Team Dissolution
description: Safety, ethics, or alignment team was disbanded, downsized, or absorbed into capabilities work.

name: Ethical AI Research Suppression
description: Company suppressed, censored, or restricted publication of safety or ethics research.

name: Copyright and Data Ethics
description: Concerns about training data sourcing, copyright violations, or data ethics practices.
